# GitHub CODEOWNERS — generated by sub-agents/01-decompose/team-ownership-map.md
# Syntax: <path-pattern>  <@user-or-team>...
# Path patterns match files relative to repo root.
# More specific lines override earlier matches.

# Defaults
*                                @{{ORG}}/platform-eng

# Spec, design, tasks (migration artifacts) — domain owners
/domains/auth/                   @{{ORG}}/team-iam
/domains/customers/              @{{ORG}}/team-cust
/domains/catalog/                @{{ORG}}/team-cat
/domains/search/                 @{{ORG}}/team-search
/domains/cart/                   @{{ORG}}/team-cart
/domains/checkout/               @{{ORG}}/team-checkout
/domains/orders/                 @{{ORG}}/team-commerce
/domains/payments/               @{{ORG}}/team-payments @{{ORG}}/security-payments
/domains/returns/                @{{ORG}}/team-returns
/domains/fulfillment/            @{{ORG}}/team-fulfillment
/domains/notifications/          @{{ORG}}/team-platform
/domains/reporting/              @{{ORG}}/team-data

# Source code per domain
/src/auth/                       @{{ORG}}/team-iam
/src/customers/                  @{{ORG}}/team-cust
/src/payments/                   @{{ORG}}/team-payments @{{ORG}}/security-payments
# ... etc

# Contracts — owner-domain reviews; consumers get a courtesy CC via PR description
/contracts/auth/                 @{{ORG}}/team-iam
/contracts/payments/             @{{ORG}}/team-payments

# Shared kernel
/lib/money/                      @{{ORG}}/team-platform
/lib/auth-utils/                 @{{ORG}}/team-iam
/lib/types/                      @{{ORG}}/team-platform

# Infrastructure
/infra/                          @{{ORG}}/sre
/infra/strangler/                @{{ORG}}/sre @{{ORG}}/platform-eng

# Migration state file — privileged
/migration-state.json            @{{ORG}}/migration-leads

# CI / build
/.github/                        @{{ORG}}/platform-eng
/.github/CODEOWNERS              @{{ORG}}/eng-leadership
